# data-views-in-sync

Fails if `plugins/primitives/plugins/data-view/shared/data-views.generated.ts`
drifts from the current set of `defineDataView("<id>")` marker calls (scanned
from every plugin's `web/**`). Fix by running `./singularity build` and
committing the regenerated manifest.
